Why YZ

CRAFTED FOR
EXCELLENCE

⚗️

Premium Ingredients

Vegetable glycerin, propylene glycol, and USP-grade nicotine salt — only the purest compounds make it into every bottle.

🎯

Precision Nicotine Dosing

Every 30ml bottle is precisely formulated to 30MG nicotine salt for consistent, satisfying delivery every time.

🌟

Diverse Flavor Portfolio

From tropical fruits to dessert classics — our 10+ flavor lineup ensures there's a perfect match for every palate.

🔒

Safety First

Child-resistant caps, 18+ age restriction, and clear labeling. YZ takes product safety as seriously as flavor quality.
